sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent: Implement four @Query methods in NativeReconciliationRepository: findVariance, calculateLeakedCapital, calculateEscrowHolding, calculateSafeIncome using native SQL with sessionId parameter binding.

Coder Agent: Create ReconciliationService.reconcile method with @Transactional annotation that calls all four repository methods, updates ReconciliationSession entity fields, and logs steps using SLF4J.
Coder Agent: Implement error handling in ReconciliationService with try-catch blocks for ReconciliationException, logging anomalies with sessionId context without exposing stack traces.
Coder Agent: Create ReconciliationController with POST /api/sessions/{sessionId}/reconcile endpoint returning 202 Accepted and GET /api/sessions/{sessionId}/metrics endpoint returning KPI amounts.
Tester Agent: Write unit tests for NativeReconciliationRepository using embedded PostgreSQL/MySQL test DB, covering edge cases: zero variance, NULL fees, mismatched order IDs.
Tester Agent: Write integration tests for ReconciliationService mocking repository calls, testing transaction rollback, and session update logic.
Tester Agent: Create guardrail compliance test using static analysis plugin to verify no Java loops exist over TempShopeeOrder/TempLogisticsOrder tables.
Tester Agent: Implement performance load test with >10k rows using generated CSV data, asserting reconciliation completes within <500ms and monitors JVM memory usage.
Tester Agent: Write error-path tests injecting malformed data (non-numeric fees) to verify graceful logging and exception handling.
Reviewer Agent: Conduct architectural review to confirm all calculations use native SQL and maintain session isolation via foreign-key constraints.
Reviewer Agent: Perform security review validating parameterized SQL queries, unchanged JWT/RBAC, and OWASP top-10 compliance.
Reviewer Agent: Complete code review checklist: verify no staging table loops, all SQL parameterized, logging includes sessionId, exception handling secure.
Reviewer Agent: Provide final sign-off approval for promotion to CI pipeline after all review criteria are satisfied.
DevOps Agent: Verify Dockerfile multi-stage build includes new Java classes without requiring modifications.
DevOps Agent: Update github/workflows/ci.yml to add Phase-3 specific test steps (unit + performance) that fail build on guardrail violations.
DevOps Agent: Add Prometheus metrics for reconciliation latency (reconciliation_duration_seconds) and error rate (reconciliation_errors_total).
DevOps Agent: Configure ReconciliationLogger to output JSON format compatible with ELK stack logging.
Manager Agent: Validate Phase-3 deliverables against Definition of Done checklist: native SQL queries, service orchestration, controller endpoints, guardrail compliance.
Manager Agent: Confirm resource allocation for Coder, Tester, Reviewer, and DevOps within the 2-3 day window is sufficient.
Manager Agent: Provide final Go/No-Go decision and approval to proceed to Phase 4 after collecting all sign-offs.
